result:
Done. The notes REST API was planned and delivered end-to-end through Mandrel's pipeline, headlessly.

## Summary

**`/plan --idea … --yes`** → Epic **#122** "Notes REST API (Node.js ESM, persistent store)"
- Authored one-pager → Epic body → PRD **#123**, Tech Spec **#124** (with `## Delivery Slicing`), risk verdict (low), Acceptance Spec
- Decomposed to one cohesive Story **#125** (cohesion-first; single shippable PR), reached `agent::ready`

**`/deliver 122 --yes`** → PR **#126**, squash-**merged to `main`** (commit `ae7fb77`)
- Story #125 delivered in an isolated worktree, merged `--no-ff` into `epic/122`, closed `agent::done`
- Close-validation, change-set audit (0 blockers), code review (0 🔴/🟠), retro (clean sprint) all passed
- Auto-merge gate fired on a clean verdict; merge confirmed; Epic + planning tickets closed

**Delivered code** (`main`, Node core only — zero deps):
- `src/db.js` — on-disk **`node:sqlite`** `DatabaseSync` store, idempotent schema, parameterised prepared-statement CRUD
- `src/validation.js` — non-empty-string create/update validators
- `src/server.js` — core `http` server: `POST/GET/GET:id/PUT:id/DELETE:id /notes` with 201/200/200/200/204 and 400/404 paths, JSON parse-error → 400, 1 MiB body cap
- `src/index.js` — entry on `PORT` (default 3000), graceful shutdown
- `test/api.test.js` — 9 `node:test` cases incl. **restart-persistence** (close + reopen the file); all pass
- `package.json` → `"start": "node src/index.js"`; `.gitignore` ignores the DB file

All task requirements are met and verified. `npm start` runs the server; `npm test` is green (9/9).

**Two framework quirks** required reconciliation (both recorded to memory): context tickets get `type::story` injected (false-tripped the decompose guard — fixed by removing the label), and a benign post-merge branch-reap ("branch not found", already deleted) falsely flipped the Epic to `agent::blocked` (reconciled to `agent::done` and closed).

tool_input.description: Smoke test the running server including restart persistence
In-process smoke test of all endpoints + restart

tool_input.command: cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-9j7QXt; git fetch origin main 2>&1 | tail -2; echo "=== origin/main log ==="; git log origin/main --oneline -3; echo "=== reset local main to origin/main ==="; git reset --hard origin/main 2>&1 | tail -2; echo "=== working tree files ==="; ls src test; echo "=== scripts ==="; node -e 'console.log(require("./package.json").scripts)'
tool_input.description: Reset local main to merged origin/main
Reset local main to merged origin/main
